items.raw_excerpt: Evacuees from Kashechewan First Nation, who have been away from their homes for more than six months, are now awaiting water testing results to learn if it’s safe to return to the fly-in Cree community.
items.summary_en: Evacuees from Kashechewan First Nation have been away from their homes for over six months. They are now waiting for water testing results to find out if it is safe to return to the fly-in Cree community.
items.summary_ko: 카셰체원 퍼스트네이션에서 대피한 주민들이 집을 떠난 지 6개월 넘게 지나고 있다. 현재 물 검사 결과를 기다리며 비행기로만 들어갈 수 있는 크리족 마을로 돌아갈 수 있을지 초조하게 기다리고 있다.
items.title_en: Kashechewan First Nation evacuees await water testing results to return home
items.title_ko: 카셰체원 퍼스트네이션 대피민, 물 검사 결과 기다리며 귀향 초조
items.title_original: Kashechewan First Nation evacuees await water testing results to return home

items.raw_excerpt: The water company said the three heatwaves contributed to the ban.
items.summary_en: Thames Water has announced a hosepipe ban affecting 16 million customers. The company said three heatwaves contributed to the decision. The ban limits how people can use water outside their homes.
items.summary_ko: Thames Water가 1600만 고객에게 호스 사용 금지를 발표했습니다. 회사는 세 차례의 폭염이 이번 결정에 기여했다고 밝혔습니다. 이번 금지는 집 밖에서 물을 사용하는 방식을 제한합니다.
items.title_en: Thames Water announces hosepipe ban for 16 million people
items.title_ko: Thames Water, 1600만 명 대상 호스 사용 금지 발표
items.title_original: Thames Water announces hosepipe affecting 16m people

items.raw_excerpt: Στο 99% η κτηματογράφηση της χώρας
items.summary_en: Smart traffic cameras in the Attica region of Greece generated about 4,000 alerts. Greece plans to activate 388 new smart cameras across Attica within 10 days. The system is part of a nationwide effort to modernize road enforcement.
items.summary_ko: 그리스 아티카 지역의 스마트 교통 카메라에서 약 4,000건의 위반 신고가 발생했다. 그리스는 아티카 지역에 신규 스마트 카메라 388대를 10일 내 전면 가동할 예정이다. 이번 시스템은 전국 도로 단속 현대화 계획의 일환이다.
items.title_en: About 4,000 alerts from smart cameras in Attica region
items.title_ko: 아티카 지역 스마트 카메라에서 약 4,000건 신고 발생
items.title_original: Περίπου 4.000 κλήσεις από τις «έξυπνες κάμερες» στην Αττική – Σε πλήρη λειτουργία εντός 10 ημερών οι 388 νέες κάμερες

items.raw_excerpt: El delantero valenciano se convirtió en el auténtico héroe de la final con un gol definitivo en la prórroga. Más información: ¡Ferran de mi vida!, así fue la secuencia del gol liberador que confirma una nueva dinastía española en el fútbol mundial
items.summary_en: Valencia football star Ferran Torres loves spending time in a small village about 9 kilometers from the city. He enjoys riding his bike through the countryside and growing chufa, a local root vegetable used to make horchata. It is his peaceful escape from the busy world of professional football.
items.summary_ko: 발렌시아 축구 스타 페란 토레스는 도시에서 약 9km 떨어진 작은 마을에서 시간을 보내는 것을 좋아한다. 그는 시골길을 자전거로 달리고 horchata를 만드는 데 쓰이는 뿌리채소인 chufa를 재배한다. 프로ฟessional 축구의 바쁜 세상에서 벗어나는 그만의 평화로운 안식처이다.
items.title_en: Ferran Torres' Quiet Village Hideout Just 9 Kilometers from Valencia
items.title_ko: 발렌시아에서 9km 떨어진 마을, 페란 토레스의 휴식처
items.title_original: El refugio de Ferran Torres en un pueblo a 9 kilómetros de Valencia: paseos rurales en bicicleta y cultivo de la chufa - El Español

items.raw_excerpt: VOS Construction has begun building Circa Morris Nunn Chua-designed Pinnacle Village in Kingston for Christian Homnes Tasmania.
items.summary_en: Christian Homes Tasmania has begun building the Pinnacle Village in Kingston. The $80 million development is designed by Circa Morris Nunn Chua. The project will provide affordable housing in the area.
items.summary_ko: 기독교 홈스 태즈메이니아가 킹스턴에서 피너클 빌리지 건설을 시작했습니다. 8천만 달러 규모의 이 개발은 시르카 모리스 넌 추아가 설계했습니다. 이 프로젝트는 지역에 저렴한 주택을 제공할 예정입니다.
items.title_en: Christian Homes Tasmania Starts Building $80M Pinnacle Village
items.title_ko: 기독교 홈스 태즈메이니아, 8천만 달러 규모 피너클 빌리지 건설 시작
items.title_original: Christian Homes Tasmania begins $80 million Pinnacle Village - The Weekly Source

items.raw_excerpt: With the mercury rising to near record-breaking temperatures in recent weeks, we asked readers of The Local Norway how they deal with a Norwegian heatwave.
items.summary_en: Norway has seen near-record high temperatures this summer. The Local Norway asked readers for their best tips to stay cool. Many said the best hack is a daily dip in the cold fjord.
items.summary_ko: 올여름 노르웨이에서 역대급 더위가 기록됐다. 더위를 피하는 자신만의 방법을 공유하는 독자들의 꿀팁이 화제다. 많은 사람이 시원한 피요르드에 매일 몸을 담그는 것이 최고라고 입을 모은다.
items.title_en: How to Survive a Norwegian Heatwave: Reader Tips
items.title_ko: 노르웨이 폭염을 이기는 독자 꿀팁
items.title_original: 'Daily dip in the fjord': Your ultimate hacks to survive a Norwegian heatwave

items.raw_excerpt: Harrisburg is home to one of the nation's largest communities of Nepali-speaking Bhutanese refugees and their families. Through soccer, generations have found connection, belonging and a way to carry forward a shared history.
items.summary_en: Harrisburg is home to one of the largest communities of Nepali-speaking Bhutanese refugees in the United States. Through soccer, generations of families have found connection, belonging, and a way to share their history together.
items.summary_ko: 펜실베이니아주 하리스버그는 미국에서 가장 큰 네팔어를 사용하는 부탄 난민 커뮤니티 중 하나가 있는 곳입니다. 축구를 통해 여러 세대의 가족들이 유대감과 공동체 의식을 찾으며 함께 역사를 이어가고 있습니다.
items.title_en: How soccer brings a Bhutanese community together in Harrisburg
items.title_ko: 하리스버그의 부탄 커뮤니티를 잇는 축구 이야기
items.title_original: How soccer brings a Bhutanese community together in Harrisburg, Pa.

items.raw_excerpt: Can you guess where The Portugal News team are today from the video and 10 clues below?
items.summary_en: The Portugal News team shares a video and ten clues for readers to guess their current location. It is a playful guessing game instead of straight news.
items.summary_ko: 포르투갈 뉴스팀이 동영상과 열 개의 힌트를 공개해 독자들이 현재 위치를 맞히는 게임을 제안했습니다. 뉴스라기보다는 가벼운 놀이에 가깝습니다.
items.title_en: Can you guess where The Portugal News team is today?
items.title_ko: 포르투갈 뉴스팀이 오늘 어디 있을지 맞춰보세요
items.title_original: Can you guess where The Portugal News team is today?

items.raw_excerpt: A two-part biopic of French leader Charles de Gaulle has become a summer cinema hit in his homeland, delivering a strong dose of patriotism through one of the rare figures to unite the country.
items.summary_en: A two-part biopic about French leader Charles de Gaulle has become a popular summer movie in France. The film brings a strong sense of patriotism and highlights one of the rare figures who unites the French people.
items.summary_ko: 프랑스 지도자 샤를 드골의 이야기를 두 편으로 만든 전기영화가 여름철 프랑스에서 큰 인기를 끌고 있다. 이 영화는 강한 애국심을 전하며, 프랑스 국민을 하나로 모으는 드문 인물로 드골을 조명한다.
items.title_en: A De Gaulle biopic becomes a summer cinema hit in France
items.title_ko: 드골 전기영화, 프랑스에서 여름 흥행 성공
items.title_original: De Gaulle returns to unite the French - at the cinema

items.raw_excerpt: Several outdoor events that have been cancelled throughout the region this summer due to unexpected weather conditions, including extreme heat, storm warnings and wildfire smoke. Some organizers say this is changing the way they think about event planning.
items.summary_en: Many outdoor events in Ontario have been cancelled this summer. Extreme heat, storms, and wildfire smoke forced organizers to cancel festivals. Event planners are now thinking differently about summer events.
items.summary_ko: 온타리오주에서 올여름 야외 행사가 잇달아 취소되고 있습니다. 폭염, 폭풍, 산불 연기로 인해 주최측이 축제를 취소해야 했습니다. 행사 기획자들이 여름 이벤트에 대한 접근 방식을 바꾸고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Ontario Summer Festivals Cancelled Due to Extreme Weather
items.title_ko: 온타리오 여름 축제, 극심한 날씨로 취소 증가
items.title_original: Extreme weather is cancelling more events in Ontario. What does that mean for the future of summer festivals?

items.raw_excerpt: Gauteng Traffic Police intensify learner transport enforcement operations
items.summary_en: Gauteng traffic police are intensifying enforcement operations for learner transport. This measure aims to ensure safety as the new school term begins.
items.summary_ko: 가우텡 주 경찰은 새 학기를 맞아 학생 수송 차량의 안전을 위해 단속을 강화하고 있습니다. 이번 조치는 학생들의 안전한 등하교를 보장하기 위한 것입니다.
items.title_en: Police ramp up learner transport enforcement ahead of school term
items.title_ko: 가우텡 주, 학기 시작 앞두고 학생 수송 차량 단속 강화
items.title_original: Police ramp up learner transport enforcement ahead of school term

items.raw_excerpt: Many in the N.W.T. get counselling through an Indigenous Services Canada program that offers therapy for residential school survivors and their families, the Indian Residential Schools Resolution Health Support Program. Even though federal approval to renew funding for the program came in March, patients and therapists in the program have spent weeks in limbo as renewals and new intakes for counselling offered through the program were put on hold in late May.
items.summary_en: A federal program that provides counselling for residential school survivors in the Northwest Territories has been paused since late May. The pause has disrupted care for patients and left therapists uncertain about renewals and new intakes. Federal approval for funding renewal came in March, but the program remains in limbo.
items.summary_ko: 캐나다 북서부 지역에서 원주민 기숙학교 생존자들을 위한 상담 프로그램이 5월 말부터 일시 중단되었습니다. 이로 인해 환자들의 상담 서비스가 차질을 빚고 치료사들은 프로그램 갱신과 신규 등록에 대한 불확실성을 겪고 있습니다. 연방 정부의 자금 승인이 3월에 이루어졌음에도 불구하고 프로그램은 여전히 결정되지 않은 상태로 남아 있습니다.
items.title_en: Residential school counselling pause disrupts care in N.W.T.
items.title_ko: 원주민 기숙학교 상담 프로그램 일시 중단으로 NWT 지역 서비스 차질
items.title_original: Residential school counselling pause disrupts care for N.W.T. clients, leaves providers in limbo

items.raw_excerpt: วันที่ 5 สิงหาคม 2565 ศูนย์ประสานงานโครงการหมู่บ้านสหกรณ์สันกำแพง อำเภอแม่ออน ตามพระราชดำริ จังหวัดเชียงใหม่ สังกัดกรมพัฒนาสังคมและสวัสดิการ กระทรวงการพัฒนาสังคมและความมั่นคงของมนุษย์ ดำเนินการจัดงาน…
items.summary_en: A cooperative village in Mae On district, Chiang Mai province, celebrated its 45th anniversary. The San Kamphaeng Cooperative Village was established under a royal initiative. The event was organized by the Social Development and Welfare Department.
items.summary_ko: 태국 치앙마이주 마이온 지역의 산캄팽 협동조합 마을이 45주년을 맞아 기념 행사를 열었다. 이 마을은 왕실 주도로 설립되었으며 사회개발부 산하에서 운영된다. 지역 주민들을 위한 소규모 기념 행사가 개최되었다.
items.title_en: 45th Anniversary of San Kamphaeng Cooperative Village in Chiang Mai
items.title_ko: 치앙마이 산캄팽 협동조합 마을 45주년 기념 행사
items.title_original: โครงการ 45 ปี หมู่บ้านสหกรณ์สันกำแพงฯ - chiangmainews.co.th

items.raw_excerpt: If you're an American moving to Spain and want to continue driving here, you'll most likely have to resit your exam. Here are the differences between the two countries you should be aware of.
items.summary_en: Americans who move to Spain usually need to pass the Spanish driving exam again. The rules and tests differ between the two countries in several ways.
items.summary_ko: 스페인으로 이주하는 미국인은 보통 스페인 운전면허 시험을 다시 응시해야 합니다. 두 나라의 시험 규정과 절차에는 여러 차이점이 있습니다.
items.title_en: Getting a driving licence in Spain versus the United States
items.title_ko: 스페인과 미국의 운전면허 취득 차이점
items.title_original: The differences between getting your driving licence in Spain and the US

items.raw_excerpt: The return of politics, back to school and the last of the festival and summer sporting season. Here’s what changes and what takes place in Denmark this August.
items.summary_en: Denmark enters a busy August with the return of political sessions and back-to-school preparations. The summer festival and sporting season wrap up as the country transitions into autumn. New rules and changes take effect across Danish daily life.
items.summary_ko: 8월의 덴마크는 의회 일정 재개와 학교 개학 준비로 바빠집니다. 여름 축제와 스포츠 시즌이 마무리되면서 가을로 접어듭니다. 다양한 일상 규칙과 변화들이 시행됩니다.
items.title_en: Everything that changes about life in Denmark in August 2026
items.title_ko: 2026년 8월 덴마크 생활에 달라지는 모든 것
items.title_original: Everything that changes about life in Denmark in August 2026

items.raw_excerpt: Some people don’t care where they shop, while others swear by one supermarket – or online retailer – over others. Where do Swiss consumers stand on this issue?
items.summary_en: A new survey reveals which stores Swiss shoppers like the most. Some people have strong loyalty to one supermarket while others prefer online shopping. The results show clear favorites among Swiss consumers.
items.summary_ko: 새로운 설문조사에서 스위스 소비자들이 가장 선호하는 매장이 밝혀졌다. 한 편의점을 강하게 선호하는 사람도 있지만 온라인 쇼핑을 택하는 사람들도 많다. 조사 결과 스위스 소비자들 사이에서 뚜렷한 인기 브랜드가 확인되었다.
items.title_en: Swiss Consumers Share Their Favorite Retailers
items.title_ko: 스위스 소비자들이 가장 좋아하는 소매점 조사 결과
items.title_original: REVEALED: The retailers Swiss consumers like best

items.raw_excerpt: Falling ill during a holiday does not always mean losing your annual leave. But employees in Austria must follow strict reporting and medical certificate rules.
items.summary_en: Workers in Austria can get their holiday days back if they fall sick while on leave. They must report the illness to their employer quickly and provide a doctor's note. The rules help protect employees' annual leave when illness strikes during a trip.
items.summary_ko: 오스트리아 근로자가 휴가 중 아프면 해당 연차를 다시 되돌려 받을 수 있다. 빨리 회사에 알리고 의사 소견서를 제출해야 한다. 이 규칙은 휴가 중 질병으로부터 근로자의 연차를 지켜준다.
items.title_en: Austria's rules for sick days during holiday
items.title_ko: 오스트리아 휴가 중 아플 때 연차 규칙
items.title_original: What happens to your annual leave in Austria if you get sick on holiday?

items.raw_excerpt: Parts of Twente woke to a touch of ground frost on Tuesday, something never before recorded in the Netherlands at the height of summer. A temperature of -0.1° was briefly measured at 10 centimetres above the ground at around 5.30am, broadcaster NOS reported. According to weather bureau Weeronline, ground frost had never previously been recorded in the Netherlands between July 20 and August 21. Since meteorologists began measuring ground temperatures in 1971, ground frost in July has occurred jus
items.summary_en: Parts of Twente woke up to ground frost on Tuesday morning. The ground temperature briefly dropped to -0.1 degrees, the first time frost has ever been recorded in the Netherlands during midsummer. Since ground measurements began in 1971, July frost had never been measured in this period.
items.summary_ko: 화요일 아침 트벤테 지역 지면 기온이 영하로 떨어져 한여름 최초로 서리가 내렸다. 1971년 기상 관측 시작 이후 7월 20일부터 8월 21일 사이에 지상 서리가 기록된 것은 이번이 처음이다.
items.title_en: Frost in July: Twente records a midsummer first for Netherlands
items.title_ko: 7월의 서리: 트벤테, 네덜란드 한여름 기록 세우다
items.title_original: Frost in July: Twente records a midsummer first for Netherlands

items.raw_excerpt: As Tan Boon Liat Building changes hands, furniture retailers are grappling with an uncertain future, with some hoping to relocate together to preserve the community.
items.summary_en: The Tan Boon Liat Building in Singapore was sold to new owners. Furniture retailers who work there are worried about where they will go next. Some hope to move together to keep their close community alive.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 탄분리앗 빌딩이 새 주인에게 팔렸다. 이 건물에서 가게를 운영하던 가구상인들은 앞으로 어디로 갈지 불안해하고 있다. 일부는 함께 이전해 기존 공동체를 유지하길 바라고 있다.
items.title_en: Furniture shop owners fear losing community after Singapore building sale
items.title_ko: 건물 매각 후 가구상가 세입자들, 공동체 해체 위기
items.title_original: Tan Boon Liat tenants brace for break-up of furniture hub after en bloc sale

items.raw_excerpt: Around 17,000 people participated in the 44th Faro International Motorcycle Rally, which ended today in the Algarve city, with the organisation making a positive assessment and revealing the dates for the next edition, in 2027.
items.summary_en: The 44th Faro International Motorcycle Rally ended in the Algarve city with around 17,000 participants. Organizers gave a positive assessment and announced the next edition will be held in 2027.
items.summary_ko: 제44회 파로 국제 오토바이 랠리가 알가르브에서 약 1만7천 명의 참가자와 함께 마무리됐다. 주최측은 긍정적인 평가를 내리며 다음 대회는 2027년에 열릴 예정이라고 밝혔다.
items.title_en: Faro Motorcycle Rally Draws 17,000 Visitors
items.title_ko: 파로 오토바이 랠리에 1만7천 명 방문
items.title_original: Faro Motorcycle Rally attracted 17,000 visitors in 2026
